projectDescription: A high-performance Arduino and PlatformIO TFT graphics library for ESP32, ESP8266, RP2040, and STM32 microcontrollers, delivering 3–10× faster rendering than generic alternatives.
keyFeatures: 3–10× faster rendering than generic Arduino TFT libraries using processor-specific optimizations
Supports ESP32, ESP8266, RP2040 (Raspberry Pi Pico), and STM32 microcontrollers
Multiple interface types: 4-wire SPI, 8-bit parallel, and 16-bit parallel (RP2040 only)
Hardware DMA support on RP2040, ESP32/S3, and STM32 for non-blocking pixel transfers
TFT_eSprite off-screen rendering buffer for flicker-free animation
Built-in XPT2046 SPI touch controller integration
Flexible font system: Adafruit GFX fonts plus smooth anti-aliased VLW TrueType-style fonts
Wide display controller support: ILI9341, ST7789, ST7735, ST7796, GC9A01, HX8357, SSD1351, and more
TFT_eSPI_Button widget for interactive touchscreen UI elements
PlatformIO per-project configuration via build_flags — no shared file editing required
